since_last: 28% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.60%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 28% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.63% · BTC +2.85% · Gold +1.40% · Nasdaq100 -2.21%. 28% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.60%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.60%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -7.48%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -13.96%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +10.17%, ISRG +4.72%, ADBE +4.69%, ADBE +4.69%, AAPL +4.65%. Laggards: TER -13.96%, KLAC -12.89%, LRCX -11.35%, CEVA -11.32%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.15% at $157.31
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
